programme.title: Rehearsal for Murder
programme.desc: Alex Dennison Robert Preston is a playwright engaged to actress Monica Welles Lynn Redgrave But on the opening night of her new Broadway play she kills herself over some bad reviews Thoroughly distraught Alex cant believe shed commit suicide and begins to suspect she was actually murdered Under the pretext of having them read for his new play Alex invites all of the suspicious parties to an empty theater and locks them in until the truth comes out

programme.title: Leave of Absence
programme.desc: When a married mans mistress falls seriously ill he must make the toughest choice of his life

programme.title: Perry Mason The Case of the Telltale Talk Show Host
programme.desc: Dr Sheila Carlin is good friends with Della who calls Perry in when she is being pestered by someone On the theory that it could be somebody that she works with at a radio stations she arranges Perry to be interviewed by Winslow Keene who is also the stations owner Winslow enrages the rest of the talk show hosts on the station by informing them of changes that he is making to their time slots That night Winslow is shot by a hit man hired by someone at the station and Sheila is set up for the murder She calls in Perry and as usual Perry Della and Ken swing into action to find out who really did it

programme.title: Perry Mason The case of the reckless romeo
programme.desc: Sleazy talk show host Ted Mayne has a tell-all book that enrages prominent women One actress Roxanne Shield makes a televised death threat Ted is murdered and she is charged Witnesses say they saw her outside his apartment that night

programme.title: TBH 214
programme.desc: TBH 214

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Kate has some exciting news for Billie Jo the endowment policy that her father who Billie Jo is named after invested for her has matured Williams last wish was for Billie Jo to use the money to go to medical school Kate expects Billie Jo to fulfill that last wish

programme.title: The Mystery of the Hooded Horsemen
programme.desc: In a small frontier mining town a gang of outlaws in black hoods is running roughshod over locals presiding over a reign of terror Tex Tex Ritter and Stubby Horace Murphy take up the dying wish of Tom Lafe McKee a kindly rancher killed by the gang to capture the marauders Knowing that the survival of the local mine and the heart of Toms sweet daughter Iris Meredith are on the line Tex and Stubby go undercover in the gang hoping to bring them down from the inside

programme.title: My Pal Trigger
programme.desc: Gabby refuses to mate his stallion with Roys horse When his horse runs away from the house he blames Roy and gets him jailed

programme.title: Billy the Kid Returns
programme.desc: Rogers plays a lookalike to the dead Billy The Kid and restores the tranquility of Lincoln County after subduing the criminal element

programme.title: Savage Guns
programme.desc: In Sonora in a lonesome valley near the border of Arizona ex-major Summer tries to forget about the horrors of the war of independence on his farm He has foresworn to violence His intention is put to the test when a gang of villains ravages the small town

programme.title: Song of the Gringo
programme.desc: Several miners are killed and their mines are confiscated by a mysterious person Tex an undercover cop is asked to investigate the murders However Tex ends up being implicated as a criminal

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Rocky Bullwinkle Jet Fuel Part 35 Fractured Fairy Tales Pinocchio Peabodys Improbably History First Kentucky Derby Rocky Bullwinkle Jet Fuel Part 36

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Rocky Bullwinkle Jet Fuel Part 37 Fractured Fairy Tales Little Red Riding Hood Peabodys Improbably History P T Barnum Rocky Bullwinkle Jet Fuel Part 38

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: He just wants to get out of town and skip college in his restored Ford Mustang and she will do anything at all to join a local sorority Omega Kappa Pi which proves to be her ultimate downfall

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A married couple is trying to enjoy their anniversary However the husband is sure his wife is cheating on him

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: When an abusive agent learns that his sexy model of a girlfriend is cheating on him with a photographer he kills him and later kidnaps his girlfriend but soon learns the love is more powerful in death

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Predatory electronics salesman Jack Rhodes uses a video dating service to pick up lonely young women for one-night stands but meets his match in cunning enticing Barbara who invites Jack on a date to her high-rise apartment loft

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Taking a job with the railroad Eric meets and befriends a former prize fighter who was a childhood idol of his who is on the run from the mob after he refused to throw a fight But a bar-room brawl draws the mobs attention to the man

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick and Schanke have to protect a rock n roll star whose life is threatened

programme.title: Hogans 317
programme.desc: Hogans 317

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Learning that the German army is manufacturing an improved Tiger tank Hogan and his men are determined to steal one so they can disassemble it and make blueprints for the Allies

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Parker and the Crew scheme to get McHale chosen for a War Bond tour of The States but when they find out that they wont be included they must cook up another plan to get McHale off the hook

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Gruber has been selling Fujis Polynesian dishes to the Taratupa personnel and trouble develops when Binghamton - Having sampled the delicious food - Insists that it be served at a dinner for a visiting Admiral

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Hogans operation is known to a Gestapo man who wants to trade his knowledge for 1000000 in diamonds but can he be trusted

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer meets a family from N Carolina who have encountered truck problems en route to Oregon so Gomer puts them up in a blasting range cabin untill he has time to fix their truck

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The professor makes a dye marker to help get rescued The Skipper plans to join the Navy when they get home but he finds out he must lose weight to meet their requirements--and Gilligan finds out that he must gain weight too

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways discover that a celebrated eccentric artist is on the island and they try to trick him into wanting to return to civilization so that they can use his transmitter

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Scandal erupts when a 30-year-old photo of Flora clad in a scanty swimsuit winds up in a local publication

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa wagers Kates prize hen Jenny on Little Luke winning a corn-eating contest

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ is tricked into returning to Orly County where hes quickly arrested and imprisoned by the unscrupulous Sheriff Lobo BJ and his fellow falsely accused prisoners plot a jailbreak and a mad dash for the county line

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Marital strife boils over in both the Post and Addison households and Mister Ed goes to work as an extra in a western movie

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed attempts to torpedo Wilburs plans to have him march in the Pagent Parade

programme.title: KILL ROMMEL
programme.desc: During WWII US Lieutenant Morris and British captain Hull are assigned in a mission to kill Rommel

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget is sent to retrieve a group of Malaysian explorers who are now MADs prisoners

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby suspects that MAD have stolen the national treasure of Ireland the Blarney Stone and sends Gadget to retrieve it

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: In 1944 a German sergeant gets involved in an anti-Hitler conspiracy and saves the life of an American colonel

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The expansive Taybor an intergalactic merchant arrives from hyperspace on his ship The Emporium He is offering to sell things to the Alphans Koenig realizes that if the Taybor sold them his spaceship it would enable the Alphans to fly back to Earth but the price the Taybor is asking for this transaction is Maya

programme.title: Android
programme.desc: A strange doctor secretly experiments with androids on his space station His assistant is Max a curious android who wants to see the world and meet a girl Criminals hide on their station and soon violence erupts

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Boss gets Uncle Jesse to enter a contest for a new type of fossil fuel saying that moonshine is the perfect way to cut down on pollution However Boss has more up his sleeve He plans to tip off the authorities and once Jesse is arrested take credit for the idea himself

programme.title: Hercules 216
programme.desc: Hercules 216

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Daan looses his contact with the the Taelon Commonality This causes him to change and Zoor instructs that Daan must be killed; because hes now considered a threat

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The alien embryo created on the Breeding Groundepisode has now grown and is now a pre-adolescent in human terms named Adam residing in a special school occupied by human children with exceptional IQs secretly run by the Morthren The aliens have nefarious plans for the children

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: The Fugitive S02E02
programme.desc: The Fugitive S02E02

programme.title: BIg Valley
programme.desc: As unrest grips a distant mining town where the Barkleys have financial interests Heath travels to the place in an attempt to diffuse the situation

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne comes to the aid of a woman but finds she has double-crossed him He tracks her down finding her a owner of a herd of cattle being driven to Kansas He joins drive as a hand but his expertise may bring him a big payday

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A single girl named Barbara has a baby and is then told the baby was stillborn However she thinks it is alive and starts asking questions at the unwed mothers home where she lived

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: When the IMFs original scheme to free an elderly cardinal from an inescapable prison in a fictional Eastern European country goes awry the team must concoct a new plan to get him out of solitary confinement

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday becomes emotionally involved in a rape-murder case of a Japanese-American war widow especially after he sees how beautiful she was and after he finds out that she left a young daughter behind Also there might be a connection with the rape of another woman the previous night Now Friday and Gannon must search for the rapist before he strikes again

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A police officer is shot during a routine stop of a car Friday and Gannon find the driver and passenger and learn they are paroled convicts The police officer cannot remember anything about the shooting event to help convict the two men

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Leo Pla at HK50

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Peel back the curtain to find out the goals and challenges of a Mixed Martial Arts fighter’s everyday life, and how it’s not much different than yours. Featuring Matt Krayco.

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The pupils seek out and find Merlin and hell teach the pupil Presto magic if he stays with Merlin Presto decides to stay and attempts a spell to create a way home but the spell summons dragons instead which attack a nearby village

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters Sir John a seemingly fearless knight But hes really a coward his village is ready to exile him unless he performs one brave deed Venger captures Sir Johns son and tells him to lead the group into a trap

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Towering Towers Game Over Man Game

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Penny and Brain are warned that MAD plan to steal rare pieces of art from the Modern Art Museum in New York and replace them with fakes

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Saw Boss offers a huge reward to pirates and cut-throats if they will deliver Jayce to him A pirate scratches Herc with his special ring which causes Herc to become evil and start plotting against Jayce Jayce must take the Pride to Planet Hippo

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce hears a rumour planted by Saw Boss that Audric is aboard the Edro Life ship a ship that is capable of carrying entire civilisations to new galaxies Jayce is able to get aboard the ship by steering the Pride through the thrusters energy flow

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Miles Mayhem has gotten hold of Brian the Brain a super computer that controls a nuclear sub With it he demands full control of the Panamal Canal

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Out in the New Orleans Bayou Jacques Lancaster has been using sap from the fire trees as a powerful but volatile fuel Miles Mayhem wants to use it to power VENOMs vehicles

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin and Pit are on their way back from Dragons Den when they get ambushed by the Sheriff of Nottinghams soldiers Kevin and Pit join forces with Robin Hood to defeat the Sheriff

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: In Hoopland an inventor is annoyed that he is small so he builds a robot and makes a wish however when the wish goes wrong; Captain N Princess Lana and Larry Bird help him by going into Hoop Mountain and face Clockman
